root_cause: Intermittent admission webhook failures causing unstable workload creation
evidence: Controller events for webhook-flap-pod show alternating webhook failures and SuccessfulCreate events
Admission webhook failures are intermittent rather than constant

causes.message: Admission webhooks are intermittently evaluating create requests
Admission webhook infrastructure alternates between failing and succeeding
Controller create attempts intermittently succeed and fail
Workload creation remains unstable due to admission flapping

likely_causes: Webhook backend replicas are intermittently unhealthy
Admission webhook is overloaded under burst traffic
Network path to webhook service is unstable
suggested_checks: Inspect webhook service latency and error rates
Check webhook controller pod restarts and readiness
Review API server admission webhook error logs
